help: you do not need to solve your whole life tonight
make the next five minutes smaller
let the day be ugly, just stay here for it
you are allowed to need help before you collapse
perspective: you don't need meaning right now, just endurance
clarity usually comes after surviving the fog
not every heavy feeling is a final truth
this moment is loud, but it is not the whole story
momentum: do the next small thing and let that be enough
you can move without feeling inspired
tiny steps still count as forward
done: surviving today is a complete task
rest also counts as making it through
you made it to this second, keep that fact
finished can mean safe, not perfect
